summary: Plan-mode classification for cluster gitcrawl-670-plan-wave-20260615-a. #67366 remains the canonical open issue for the Telegram token replacement text-input trim crash. #90284 is an open related repair PR for the same root cause family, but no merge, close, or fixed-by-candidate closeout is planned because the job blocks merge/fix actions and the PR has dirty merge state, failing checks, and unresolved maintainer-review/repair status in the hydrated artifact.
